title: Inline Code Snippets?
excerpt: Support for inline code-snippets using ticks would be great `CODE` should turn into CODE just like here in the community where markdown seems to be supported by the editor. Code snippets are so essential for software-fir…

posts.author: gentele (Lukas Gentele)
posts.cookedHtml: Support for inline code-snippets using ticks would be great `CODE` should turn into CODE just like here in the community where markdown seems to be supported by the editor. Code snippets are so essential for software-first companies. I cannot even image how engineers @monday.com themselves are using their own product without the ability to add inline code snippets. The code block formatting is there but inline is missing and ideally, the formatting could be much faster by just supporting a markdown mode.

posts.author: kcdyer (kc)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve been using monday for a few months now… This would be extremely helpful.
Currently looking at other products now because of this flaw.

posts.author: mfan (michael fanuzzi)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not sure if people from Monday read this board but this is also mentioned here: Feature Request: markdown or code formatting in Updates

posts.author: molhovsk (Marina Olhovsky-Mann)
posts.cookedHtml: Workaround: Format code in Slack and paste its screenshot in Monday
